description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical bucket with a slightly faceted exterior and a wide, open top. The surface has a marbled, dark gray and black coloration, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. Two flat, protruding side handles are visible, suggesting it is designed for easy lifting and carrying. The bucket appears to be made of a hard, possibly metallic or heavy-duty plastic material, with a matte, slightly rough finish. There are no visible lids, reinforcements, or decorative elements, but a subtle, shield-like marking is present on one side. Its robust build and practical design make it suitable for use in urban outdoor or industrial environments.
description: A dark, marbled bucket with flat side handles and a rugged, utilitarian look. The open top and sturdy build suggest it is designed for carrying or holding materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, faceted sides, and a shield-like marking on the surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the flat, protruding handles and the bucket's cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the shield-like marking visible and no handles in direct view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other flat handle and the continuous marbled texture.
